title: tomcat9 security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[1:9.0.87-8.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-124497
  tomcat: Directory traversal via rewrite with possible RCE (CVE-2025-55752)
- Resolves: RHEL-91732
  tomcat: Bypass of rules in Rewrite Valve (CVE-2025-31651)
full_text:
[1:9.0.87-8.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-124497
  tomcat: Directory traversal via rewrite with possible RCE (CVE-2025-55752)
- Resolves: RHEL-91732
  tomcat: Bypass of rules in Rewrite Valve (CVE-2025-31651)

References:
